title: Olivia Rocco Monaco 3 Pack Bath Sheets Highly Absorbent Premium Quality 100% Cotton Large Towel Set Extra Soft Quick Dry Large Towels Bath Sheet 500 GSM Washable Towels, White
features: 500GSM DURABLE 3PACK BATH SHEET: Olivia Rocco's extra large Monaco bath sheets are crafted from 100% cotton, providing a luxurious feel. Measuring 80x140 cm, these sheets feature comes with hanging loop, perfect for enhancing your bathroom's aesthetic appeal.

SMOOTH AND EASY DRY SHEETS: These cotton bath sheets excel in water absorption, thanks to the high-quality soft cotton material. Their thick and robust design allows for efficient drying, ensuring you can dry your body thoroughly in just one use.

MAXIMUM ABSORBENCY AND USAGE: Ideal for post-shower drying, these extra thick bath sheets can easily cover your entire body and dry your hair. Commonly used in luxury hotels, they are also suitable for gym sessions and beach outings, offering versatile usage.

PURE QUALITY AND CHEMICALS FREE SHEETS: Manufactured without harsh chemicals, these high GSM sheets are gentle on the skin. Made from 100% cotton, they are free from harmful substances, allowing you to use them on your face with confidence and without irritation.

WASHING INSTRUCTION: These bath sheets are designed for easy maintenance and are machine washable. Use a gentle detergent for washing, and always wash dark-colored towels separately. Avoid ironing and keep the sheets away from fire to maintain their quality and durability.
